TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == kakiliman == cacay lasubu izaw ku siwa a mihcaan cacay a bulad sabaw cacay a demiad, i tini i Dalu a kanatal Wuhan akenis, malibung ku tademaw u SARI a libung.SARI "Severe acute respiratory infection" nilaculan cacay lasubu izaw ku siwa a mihcaan cacay a bulad sabaw cacay a demiad, i tini i Dalu a kanatal Wuhan akenis, malibung ku tademaw u SARI a libung.SARI "Severe acute respiratory infection" uni a imelang pangangan hatu "SARI" ,tatenga mahiniay "SARS" Severe Acute Respiratory Syndrome a imelang, masasizumaay tu a imelang malecat tu "SARS" a imelang. anu micumut i uzip ku ledek a cilekay, milawlaway tu uculil nu izang, amasasetul tu culil nu izang. imelangay mapatay nu icelang nu uzip ku cilekay.
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == ¶a ¶aj r~…ĺasubu izaw ku siwa a mińß ¶aan ¶a ¶aj a bur~…ĺad sabaw ¶a ¶aj a d…ômiad, i tini i dar~…ĺu a kanatar~…ĺ wuńßan ak…ônis, mar~…ĺibuŇč ku tad…ômaw u sa*i a r~…ĺibuŇč.sa*i "s…ô*…ôr…ô a ¶ut…ô r…ôspiratorj inf…ô ¶tion" nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan ¶a ¶aj r~…ĺasubu izaw ku siwa a mińß ¶aan ¶a ¶aj a bur~…ĺad sabaw ¶a ¶aj a d…ômiad, i tini i dar~…ĺu a kanatar~…ĺ wuńßan ak…ônis, mar~…ĺibuŇč ku tad…ômaw u sa*i a r~…ĺibuŇč.sa*i "s…ô*…ôr…ô a ¶ut…ô r…ôspiratorj inf…ô ¶tion" uni a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč paŇčaŇčan ńßatu "sa*i" ,tat…ôŇča mańßiniaj "sa*s" s…ô*…ôr…ô a ¶ut…ô *…ôspiratorj sjndrom…ô a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč, masasizumaaj tu a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč mar~…ĺ…ô ¶at tu "sa*s" a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč. anu mi ¶umut i uzip ku r~…ĺ…ôd…ôk a ¶ir~…ĺ…ôkaj, mir~…ĺawr~…ĺawaj tu u ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ nu izaŇč, amasas…ôtur~…ĺ tu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ nu izaŇč. im…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj mapataj nu i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč nu uzip ku ¶ir~…ĺ…ôkaj.
S.FORM: == kakiliman == cacay lasubu izaw ku siwa a mihcaan cacay a bulad sabaw cacay a demiad, i tini i Dalu a kanatal Wuhan akenis, malibung ku tademaw u SARI a libung.SARI "Severe acute respiratory infection" nilaculan cacay lasubu izaw ku siwa a mihcaan cacay a bulad sabaw cacay a demiad, i tini i Dalu a kanatal Wuhan akenis, malibung ku tademaw u SARI a libung.SARI "Severe acute respiratory infection" uni a imelang pangangan hatu "SARI" ,tatenga mahiniay "SARS" Severe Acute Respiratory Syndrome a imelang, masasizumaay tu a imelang malecat tu "SARS" a imelang. anu micumut i uzip ku ledek a cilekay, milawlaway tu uculil nu izang, amasasetul tu culil nu izang. imelangay mapatay nu icelang nu uzip ku cilekay.
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == ¶a ¶aj r~…ĺasubu izaw ku siwa a mińß ¶aan ¶a ¶aj a bur~…ĺad sabaw ¶a ¶aj a d…ômiad, i tini i dar~…ĺu a kanatar~…ĺ wuńßan ak…ônis, mar~…ĺibuŇč ku tad…ômaw u sa*i a r~…ĺibuŇč.sa*i "s…ô*…ôr…ô a ¶ut…ô r…ôspiratorj inf…ô ¶tion" nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan ¶a ¶aj r~…ĺasubu izaw ku siwa a mińß ¶aan ¶a ¶aj a bur~…ĺad sabaw ¶a ¶aj a d…ômiad, i tini i dar~…ĺu a kanatar~…ĺ wuńßan ak…ônis, mar~…ĺibuŇč ku tad…ômaw u sa*i a r~…ĺibuŇč.sa*i "s…ô*…ôr…ô a ¶ut…ô r…ôspiratorj inf…ô ¶tion" uni a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč paŇčaŇčan ńßatu "sa*i" ,tat…ôŇča mańßiniaj "sa*s" s…ô*…ôr…ô a ¶ut…ô *…ôspiratorj sjndrom…ô a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč, masasizumaaj tu a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč mar~…ĺ…ô ¶at tu "sa*s" a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč. anu mi ¶umut i uzip ku r~…ĺ…ôd…ôk a ¶ir~…ĺ…ôkaj, mir~…ĺawr~…ĺawaj tu u ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ nu izaŇč, amasas…ôtur~…ĺ tu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ nu izaŇč. im…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj mapataj nu i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč nu uzip ku ¶ir~…ĺ…ôkaj.
